'''鈭歝h-w-b''' ('''kachawab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hike|hike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-w-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hike|hike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-w-b
|-
! Lemma
| kachawab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichawab|thichawab]] || [[word:jichawab|jichawab]] || [[word:shichawab|shichawab]] || [[word:kichawab|kichawab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchawab|thuthuchawab]] || [[word:jujuchawab|jujuchawab]] || [[word:shushuchawab|shushuchawab]] || [[word:kukuchawab|kukuchawab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchawab|thuchawab]] || [[word:juchawab|juchawab]] || [[word:shuchawab|shuchawab]] || [[word:kuchawab|kuchawab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchawab|thuchawab]] || [[word:juchawab|juchawab]] || [[word:shuchawab|shuchawab]] || [[word:kuchawab|kuchawab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechawab|thechawab]] || [[word:jechawab|jechawab]] || [[word:shechawab|shechawab]] || [[word:kechawab|kechawab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochawab|thothochawab]] || [[word:jojochawab|jojochawab]] || [[word:shoshochawab|shoshochawab]] || [[word:kokochawab|kokochawab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochawab|thochawab]] || [[word:jochawab|jochawab]] || [[word:shochawab|shochawab]] || [[word:kochawab|kochawab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochawab|thochawab]] || [[word:jochawab|jochawab]] || [[word:shochawab|shochawab]] || [[word:kochawab|kochawab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chawab|chawab]] || [[word:chawab|chawab]] || [[word:chawab|chawab]] || [[word:chawab|chawab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chawab|chawab]] || [[word:chawab|chawab]] || [[word:chawab|chawab]] || [[word:chawab|chawab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chawab|chawab]] || [[word:chawab|chawab]] || [[word:chawab|chawab]] || [[word:chawab|chawab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chawab|chawab]] || [[word:chawab|chawab]] || [[word:chawab|chawab]] || [[word:chawab|chawab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chawab|th忙chawab]] || [[word:j忙chawab|j忙chawab]] || [[word:sh忙chawab|sh忙chawab]] || [[word:k忙chawab|k忙chawab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachawab|thathachawab]] || [[word:jajachawab|jajachawab]] || [[word:shashachawab|shashachawab]] || [[word:kakachawab|kakachawab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachawab|thachawab]] || [[word:jachawab|jachawab]] || [[word:shachawab|shachawab]] || [[word:kachawab|kachawab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachawab|thachawab]] || [[word:jachawab|jachawab]] || [[word:shachawab|shachawab]] || [[word:kachawab|kachawab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachawab|shachawab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachawab|goshachawab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachawab|gokishachawab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachawabn眉|shachawabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachawabnkn眉|goshachawabnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachawabn眉|gokishachawabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachawabsh毛|shachawabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachawabnksh毛|goshachawabnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachawabsh毛|gokishachawabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachawabro|shachawabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachawabnkro|goshachawabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachawabro|gokishachawabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachawabmu|shachawabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachawabnkmu|goshachawabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachawabmu|gokishachawabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachawabsher|shachawabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachawabnksher|goshachawabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachawabsher|gokishachawabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachawabng|shachawabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachawabnkng|goshachawabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachawabng|gokishachawabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachawabya|shachawabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachawabnkya|goshachawabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachawabya|gokishachawabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachawabyam|shachawabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachawabnkyam|goshachawabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachawabyam|gokishachawabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachawabn眉sh毛|shachawabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachawabnkn眉sh毛|goshachawabnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachawabn眉sh毛|gokishachawabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachawabn眉ro|shachawabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachawabnkn眉ro|goshachawabnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachawabn眉ro|gokishachawabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachawabn眉mu|shachawabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachawabnkn眉mu|goshachawabnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachawabn眉mu|gokishachawabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachawabsh毛n眉|shachawabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachawabnksh毛n眉|goshachawabnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachawabsh毛n眉|gokishachawabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachawabsh毛ro|shachawabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachawabnksh毛ro|goshachawabnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachawabsh毛ro|gokishachawabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachawabsh毛mu|shachawabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachawabnksh毛mu|goshachawabnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachawabsh毛mu|gokishachawabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachawabron眉|shachawabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachawabnkron眉|goshachawabnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachawabron眉|gokishachawabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachawabrosh毛|shachawabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachawabnkrosh毛|goshachawabnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachawabrosh毛|gokishachawabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachawabromu|shachawabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachawabnkromu|goshachawabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachawabromu|gokishachawabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachawabmun眉|shachawabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachawabnkmun眉|goshachawabnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachawabmun眉|gokishachawabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachawabmush毛|shachawabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachawabnkmush毛|goshachawabnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachawabmush毛|gokishachawabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachawabmuro|shachawabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachawabnkmuro|goshachawabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachawabmuro|gokishachawabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
